response.step_by_step_log:
1. Observed vocal music in the first 22 seconds featuring a montage of Hololive 3rd Gen VTubers.
2. Extracted potential song title 'Ai Ai Ai Ai Love You' from on-screen Japanese text.
3. Attempted to search for lyrics using '"あいあいあいあいらぶゆー" Japanese and English lyrics', but no official song/lyrics found.
4. Set lyrics to null for the first scene.
5. The remainder of the video (00:23-04:58) consists of static images with instrumental background music; 'contains_vocal_music' set to false for this segment.
response.global_summary: A short montage of various Hololive 3rd generation VTubers accompanied by upbeat vocal music, followed by an extensive gallery of fan-made celebratory messages and art for their 3rd anniversary concert ("きゅるるん大作戦").

scenes.description: A montage of clips featuring Hololive 3rd generation members, with vocal music playing. Text on screen mentions 'あいあいあいあいらぶゆー'.
scenes.song_title: Ai Ai Ai Ai Love You

scenes.description: A long, static-image montage showing fan-made art and messages for the 3rd anniversary concert, with instrumental music.
